title: George Cricket Club social league concludes
description: GEORGE NEWS - The inaugural George Cricket...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The inaugural George Cricket Club businesses' social league concluded on Saturday 3 August at their home field in Rooirivierrif. Both matches were tight affairs and could have gone either way.


> The club committee thanked all the participating teams, sponsors, supporters and the George Municipality who helped to make the event possible.


"We hope to make this a regular event and build and expand on this first edition," it said in a media release. "To get involved in future editions or for any further club-related information, please visit and follow our Facebook page and send us a message."

Results of the final round

Tekkie Town (122/5) chased successfully to beat Ricoh Garden Route (119/5). Ricoh Garden Route (92/3) then chased successfully to beat Garden Route Radiology (91/6) with four balls to spare. Legal Leg Spinners ended the tournament as the only undefeated team.

The Garden Route Radiology team.

The team from Tekkie Town.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
